thought.text: It seems the URL I used for Weather.com was incorrect. Let me try a different approach using the browser.

tool_call.name: browser_navigate
tool_call.arguments: {"url": "https://www.weather.gov/forecast/bur", "new_tab": "true", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Navigating to Weather.gov for Burbank, IL temperature"}
